title: +unapprove -- staff returns a submitted sheet for revision
description: Demonstrates the staff return path. The player is pre-seeded at chargen Stage 6 with a complete sheet; +cg/submit files a CGEN job, then admin runs +unapprove with a reason -- the job is reopened with a staff comment, the submittedJob marker is cleared, and the player can edit chargen and resubmit. The chargen state is preserved; the live sheet is unchanged.

steps.note: +unapprove without a reason is refused -- staff must justify a return so the player knows what to fix.

+unapprove <player>=<reason> reopens the CGEN job with a staff comment carrying the reason, clears the submittedJob marker so the player can resubmit, and mails the player. The chargen workspace is preserved.

steps.cmd: +unapprove Rookie=Concept needs more detail -- please flesh out the backstory before resubmitting.
steps.label: admin returns

steps.note: Because no approval ever happened, the player has no live sheet to revert -- and any prior approved sheet would have been unaffected.

steps.expect: does not have an approved character sheet
